isi.lyrics:
Lyric AVOKID - Away

Romanization

sonsseul sudo eopge
teumsaero heuteojyeo
jaega doeeo sarajyeo ga
nari seon ne mame
budithigo jjillyeodo
Can’t let it show, keep it inside
Ahh I don’t even wanna know in this dark
But why can’t I close my eyes?
Ahh you’re gonna say “Away”
I know how it ends but I drop my guard
Fall like a frame in a house of cards
I gotta let you go
gotta close the door
gotta forget
all of it
I know how it ends but I fall apart
eonjenggan majuchil sunggan I’m face to face
sueopsi geuryeosseo but worse than I imagined
Can’t help but look at
can’t help but look at you
Like we were never even close, it feels so dry,
seoroui gonggineun matdaa make Borderline
seokkil su eopseo
dollil su eopseo
Right?
Ahh I’m tryna hold it in, but it cracks
My body’s breaking down
Ahh you’re saying “go away”
I know how it ends but I drop my guard
Fall like a frame in a house of cards
I gotta let you go
gotta close the door
gotta forget all of it
I know how it ends but I fall apart ‘cause of you
Wish I could fade away
Bit my tongue, but silence cut much deeper
All the words you said to me
Now they chase me through my dream
I knew all along how it ends yet I fall

Hangeul

손쓸 수도 없게
틈새로 흩어져
재가 되어 사라져 가
날이 선 네 맘에
부딪히고 찔려도

Ahh I don’t even wanna know in this dark
But why can’t I close my eyes?
Ahh you’re gonna say “Away”
I know how it ends but I drop my guard
Fall like a frame in a house of cards
I gotta let you go
gotta close the door
gotta forget
all of it
I know how it ends but I fall apart
언젠간 마주칠 순간 I’m face to face
수없이 그렸어 but worse than I imagined
Can’t help but look at
can’t help but look at you
Like we were never even close, it feels so dry,
서로의 공기는 맞닿아 make Borderline
섞일 수 없어
돌릴 수 없어
Right?
Ahh I’m tryna hold it in, but it cracks
My body’s breaking down
Ahh you’re saying “go away”
I know how it ends but I drop my guard
Fall like a frame in a house of cards
I gotta let you go
gotta close the door
gotta forget all of it
I know how it ends but I fall apart ‘cause of you
Wish I could fade away
Bit my tongue, but silence cut much deeper
All the words you said to me
Now they chase me through my dream
I knew all along how it ends yet I fall

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Seol Hoseung (SURL) - All gone

Romanization

bi naerin ohue
teong bin bang ane
teong bin bange
neo eopsi geudaero
woo~ joyonghi seoisseo

chagaun chimdaereul bwa
sumgyeori maemdora
nan geudaero geujarieseo

sigeobeorin onggireul samkimyeo
heuteojineun maldeuri seuchyeoga
nun gamgo meomchwoseoseo
gieok soge gathyeosseo

chagaun chimdaereul bwa
sumgyeori maemdora
nan geudaero geujarieseo

sigeobeorin onggireul samkimyeo
heuteojineun maldeuri seuchyeoga
neoui gieok biwonaemyeo
nega eomneun naro saraga


Hangeul

비 내린 오후에
텅 빈 방 안에
텅 빈 방에
너 없이 그대로
woo~ 조용히 서있어

차가운 침대를 봐
숨결이 맴돌아
난 그대로 그자리에서

식어버린 온기를 삼키며
흩어지는 말들이 스쳐가
눈 감고 멈춰서서
기억 속에 갇혔어

차가운 침대를 봐
숨결이 맴돌아
난 그대로 그자리에서

식어버린 온기를 삼키며
흩어지는 말들이 스쳐가
너의 기억 비워내며
네가 없는 나로 살아가

isi.albums: The Art of Sarah (Soundtrack from the Netflix Series)
isi.lyrics:
Lyric youra - Fake It So Real

Romanization

I get what I want, I always do
Brighter than fate, I’m breaking through

What I want, I always make real, no matter how far
Live in the blur between fake and real,
like stealing a star
Never bow down,
I move with the haze when shadows chase
Fake it so real, it blends with my face,
like it has its place

What do you see when I vanish
like smoke in the glass?
Some of it’s real, but I keep it masked
let the moment pass
Smile like I mean it, but maybe I don’t
Fake it so real, it blends with my face
like it has its place

I get what I want, I always do
Brighter than fate, I’m breaking through
I get what I want, I always do
Brighter than fate, I’m breaking through

Brighter than fate, I’m breaking through
I get what I want, I always do
Brighter than fate, I’m breaking through

I get what I want, I always do
Brighter than fate, I’m breaking through
I hide in the light, just out of view
Still I remain, untouched and true

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Elaine - Fake

Romanization

Shadows move that she falls
Every step’s a lie
Falling in a dark silent day hiding
from the past, from the past, from the past
No one knows the truth
Cold lips, Gold and lies
Fake name you’ll never know
Sweet lies, One touch you fade
Takes your heart like a stolen gold
She plays rich and bold
Hiding the past that you don’t know
Dark trade, into the light
Takes your heart like a stolen gold
Oh it’s never over
You will never know
You are in the dark
We will be waiting it to glow, it to glow, it to glow
You don’t never know
Cold lips, Gold and lies
Fake name you’ll never know
Sweet lies, One touch you fade
Takes your heart like a stolen gold
Cold lips, Gold and lies
Fake name you’ll never know
Sweet lies, One touch you fade
Takes your heart like a stolen gold
She plays rich and bold
Whispers in a silent night

Takes your heart like a stolen gold

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Hwang Sang Jun - The Birth of Sarah (Feat. Nam Yeji, Yoon Ji Hye)

Romanization

Even lies can feel like love tonight
Truth has slowly turned away from me
In someone’s dream, I still remain
Drifting slowly out of sight again


Hangeul

Even lies can feel like love tonight
Truth has slowly turned away from me
In someone’s dream, I still remain
Drifting slowly out of sight again

isi.driveFileNames: AMUTTA BAND - 알고 있잖아 (You know my love).mp3
isi.lyrics:
Lyric AMUTTA BAND - 알고 있잖아 (You know my love)

Romanization

nan nega neomu bogo sipeul ttaen
sumi chado kkeuteopsi dallyeoga

nae pume neoreul anggo
tteugeoun nummul heulligo

nal barabodeon neoui numbit
geu bichi huimihaejigi jeone

neoui du soneul kkok japgoseo
jeo haneure oechyeobonda

saranghanda neol saranghanda
neodo nae mam algo itjana

nae nune neol gadeuk damgoseo
yeongwoneul yaksokhalge

eonjerado himi deul ttaemyeon
nae eokkaee gidaeeo swimyeon dwae

i sarangui kkeuti eodira haedo
nan gwaenchana

gieokhae nae ireumeul bureul ttaen
modeun sunggan ne gyeote isseulge

geu seulpeum gipji anke
nummuri miso jitdorok

geureoge kkumkkwowatdeon sigan
i sigani jinagagi jeone

hamkke du nuneul kkok gamgoseo
maeum gipi saegyeobonda

saranghanda neol saranghanda
neodo nae mam algo itjana

nae nune neol gadeuk damgoseo
yeongwoneul yaksokhalge

eonjerado himi deul ttaemyeon
nae eokkaee gidaeeo swimyeon dwae

i sarangui kkeuti eodira haedo

naega gajin modeun geol da beoryeodo
neoman hamkkeramyeon

algo itdamyeon
neodo nae maeumgwa gatdamyeon

ne pume nal gadeuk anggoseo
yeongwoneul yaksokhaejwo

ojik neo hanaman wihae saraganeun geot
geuge nae jeombuya
oneuldo kkeuteopsi dallyeogal geoya

nan nega neomu bogo sipeul ttaen

Hangeul

난 네가 너무 보고 싶을 땐
숨이 차도 끝없이 달려가

내 품에 너를 안고
뜨거운 눈물 흘리고

날 바라보던 너의 눈빛
그 빛이 희미해지기 전에

너의 두 손을 꼭 잡고서
저 하늘에 외쳐본다

사랑한다 널 사랑한다
너도 내 맘 알고 있잖아

내 눈에 널 가득 담고서
영원을 약속할게

언제라도 힘이 들 때면
내 어깨에 기대어 쉬면 돼

이 사랑의 끝이 어디라 해도
난 괜찮아

기억해 내 이름을 부를 땐
모든 순간 네 곁에 있을게

그 슬픔 깊지 않게
눈물이 미소 짓도록

그렇게 꿈꿔왔던 시간
이 시간이 지나가기 전에

함께 두 눈을 꼭 감고서
마음 깊이 새겨본다

사랑한다 널 사랑한다
너도 내 맘 알고 있잖아

내 눈에 널 가득 담고서
영원을 약속할게

언제라도 힘이 들 때면
내 어깨에 기대어 쉬면 돼

이 사랑의 끝이 어디라 해도

내가 가진 모든 걸 다 버려도
너만 함께라면

알고 있다면
너도 내 마음과 같다면

네 품에 날 가득 안고서
영원을 약속해줘

오직 너 하나만 위해 살아가는 것
그게 내 전부야
오늘도 끝없이 달려갈 거야

난 네가 너무 보고 싶을 땐

이 사랑의 끝이 어디라 해도
난 괜찮아

기억해 내 이름을 부를 땐
모든 순간 네 곁에 있을게

그 슬픔 깊지 않게
눈물이 미소 짓도록

그렇게 꿈꿔왔던 시간
이 시간이 지나가기 전에

함께 두 눈을 꼭 감고서
마음 깊이 새겨본다

사랑한다 널 사랑한다
너도 내 맘 알고 있잖아

내 눈에 널 가득 담고서
영원을 약속할게

언제라도 힘이 들 때면
내 어깨에 기대어 쉬면 돼

이 사랑의 끝이 어디라 해도

내가 가진 모든 걸 다 버려도
너만 함께라면

알고 있다면
너도 내 마음과 같다면

네 품에 날 가득 안고서
영원을 약속해줘

오직 너 하나만 위해 살아가는 것
그게 내 전부야
오늘도 끝없이 달려갈 거야

난 네가 너무 보고 싶을 땐
